pageContext.name: T-1000
pageContext.description: Celebrating the 30th Anniversary of the sci-fi classic Terminator 2: Judgment Day, Sideshow and Darkside Collectibles Studio proudly presents T-1000 1:3 Scale Statue from the 30th Anniversary series.   Following the Sarah Connor statue, the T-1000 (portrayed by Robert Patrick) is the second addition to the T2 30th Anniversary collectibles series. Robert Patrick's likeness has been expertly reproduced in a stunning 1:3 Scale hand-sculpted statue, featuring Movie-accurate facial expression with detailed wrinkles and life-like skin texture.  Representing the final battling scene between T-800, T-1000, & Sarah Connor in the film. T-1000 statue is hand sculpted to transmit a screen accurate feeling of the exact iconic No gesture moment in the film. A secondary screen accurate option of display is given with the left hand featuring the long sharp awl index finger used to stab the shoulder of Sarah Connor.     T-1000 is presented in his screen accurate high detailed dark blue LAPD uniform featuring high-definition textures and stitching lines, the LAPD badge, Austin name tag, and pen on the shirt. The white strip along the seam of the trousers and hand-sculpted boots completes a breathtaking hyper-realistic hand sculpted costume.  A high detailed light-up themed base completes a stunning screen accurate representation of the scene.  Highly detailed and accurate the statue has been developed under the supervision of Studio Canal for a stunning result of the iconic character. The finest sculpting details are implemented in this statue to guarantee the satisfaction of all Terminator Fans.
